name: Quellor
description: The Quellor was standard-issue to Dax Railjack crews of the Old War, dating back to the earliest, pre-Sigma craft. A rapid-fire assault rifle with a hefty magazine-size, the Quellor is an all-round workhorse. Also capable of large, short-range cryo-blasts.

components.name: Alloy Plate
components.description:
Carbon steel plates used to reinforce Grineer armor.

Location: Venus, Phobos, Ceres, Jupiter, Pluto, and Sedna.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Quellor was standard-issue to Dax Railjack crews of the Old War, dating back to the earliest, pre-Sigma craft. A rapid-fire assault rifle with a hefty magazine-size, the Quellor is an all-round workhorse. Also capable of large, short-range cryo-blasts.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Tellurium
components.description:
This rare metal is foreign to the Origin System and can only be found in asteroids that have made the long journey from other stars.

Location: Archwing Missions on Uranus

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quellor Alt Fire being silent when it’s meant to be Alarming (as indicated in the Arsenal).

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.9
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Quellor being unable to use Ammo Mutation Mods. 
Fixed an issue with Quellor energy colour as per:
Fixed the Quellor’s clip rendering behind the gun if reloading while aiming.

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.6.1
patchlogs.changes: Pennant and Quellor Blueprints are now shared pickups; no longer required for all players to manually collect the pickup! Thanks for your patience as we work toward the rest of the on-foot items being picked up.
